headline: Leidos Wins US$456m Contract As Health Services Role And Valuation Stand Out
summary: Leidos Holdings (NYSE:LDOS) has been awarded a US$456 million Military OneSource contract. The award covers wide ranging well being services for service members and their families. The contract is structured as a long term federal engagement serving more than 4.7 million eligible individuals. For investors tracking Leidos primarily as a defense technology and government IT contractor, this Military OneSource award puts the managed health and support services side of the business in sharper...

headline: Investors Heavily Search Leidos Holdings, Inc. (LDOS): Here is What You Need to Know
summary: Leidos (LDOS) has received quite a bit of attention from Zacks.com users lately. Therefore, it is wise to be aware of the facts that can impact the stock's prospects.

headline: Leidos receives $869 million Army contract to accelerate military decision making
summary: Using artificial intelligence, advanced networking and modular open architecture, Leidos (NYSE: LDOS) will design, build and integrate secure systems for the Pentagon that help warfighters make better, faster decisions across the electromagnetic spectrum and land, sea, air, space and cyber domains.
